subcodes.first_line: Thy petition came before the Wronged One and was favored with the glance of loving-kindness. Praise be to God that thou hast partaken of the choice wine of the All-Merciful's utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات نزد مظلوم حاضر و بلحاظ عنایت فائز الحمد لله از رحیق بیان رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
